tweets.text:
The sneakiest bets for USA v Belgium: 

USA O1.5 Cards (-120)
Belgium O1.5 Cards (-125)

Combine them? +175...

We're about to see a VERY chippy game folks. 

Let's take advantage🫡
Every America citizen should be required to put at least $5 on USA ML tonight.

Full game draw (+260)

🇪🇸Spain to Advance

BTW: 

My team has been killing the World Cup. We're 23-13 (64%) / ROI: +29% over the last 7 days👇

Click the link in my bio to get the rest of our BEST picks for both WC games today🫡

So yes, Portugal are going to empty the tank.

Yes, Ronaldo may get one last moment.

Yes, this match has “late drama” written all over it.

But over 120 minutes, Spain are the side built to survive.

Our prediction ->

But here’s the problem...

This is Cristiano Ronaldo’s last World Cup.

He confirmed it before this match.

At 41 years old, with 6 World Cups, 23 years with Portugal, and one trophy still missing, this could literally be the final chapter.

->

Portugal’s path has been much shakier.

They finished 2nd in their group.

They needed a narrow 2-1 win over Croatia just to get here.

And even with all their names, the performances have not fully matched the talent.

That is a dangerous profile against Spain.

->

Spain have been the cleaner team all tournament.

They won Group H.

They just beat Austria 3-0.

They have not conceded a goal at this World Cup.

This is not the old Spain that passed forever and created nothing.

This version can control you and kill you.

->

That matters today because this does not set up like a normal “better team wins” match.

It sets up like a survival test.

Spain should control possession.

Portugal should suffer, defend, and wait for Ronaldo, Bruno, Leão or one transition to flip the entire game.

->

And the most recent meeting followed the same script.

Portugal and Spain played the 2025 Nations League final.

The match finished 2-2.

Portugal won on penalties.

Once again, 90 minutes were not enough.

->

There is almost never separation when these two meet.

In 5 major tournament meetings, Portugal and Spain have each won once.

The other 3 finished level.

Their 2018 World Cup meeting? 3-3.

Their Euro 2012 knockout meeting? 0-0, Spain advanced on penalties.

->

Something very uncomfortable is about to happen in Portugal vs. Spain...

Ronaldo’s final World Cup run might not end with a fairytale...

🧵

🇲🇽 Mexico scores first.

🏴 England WINS 2-1.

Give me a follow once I nail this one💪

One more wrinkle...

Norway just eliminated Brazil.

The winner tonight gets Norway.

A Norway vs. England quarterfinal would feature Erling Haaland against England's star-studded squad. 

That's a matchup FIFA, broadcasters and fans would undoubtedly love to see.

Final

The starts couldn't have been more different.

Before the first hydration break vs. Ecuador, Mexico led 7-1 in shots and doubled Ecuador in final-third touches.

England didn't register a shot in the opening 22 minutes vs. DR Congo and conceded from their opponent's only shot on

Mexico have opened this World Cup with FOUR straight clean sheets.

They've allowed just 6 shots on target all tournament and only 0.56 expected goals per match.

This defense has been elite.

As if that wasn't enough...

Mexico supporters reportedly spent much of last night outside England's hotel with horns, instruments and fireworks.

Not exactly ideal preparation before 90+ minutes at altitude.

Then there's the altitude.

Mexico City sits roughly 2,200 meters (7,200 ft) above sea level. Performance experts estimate VO₂ max can drop 10-13%, while high-speed running can fall 10-15% for teams that aren't fully acclimated.

England felt it immediately in training.

Mexico have lost just 2 of their last 89 competitive internationals at the Azteca.

In World Cup matches at the stadium?

8 wins, 2 draws. 

One of the biggest home-field advantages in world football.

Something very special is about to happen in tonight's Mexico vs. England match...

And it's all a part of the plan...

🧵
